payload.title: work:SmartList<T> Container
payload.text: Generic container supporting: add/remove objects, multi-membership (same object on multiple lists), cascade delete (destroying object removes from all lists), parent-child ownership (destroying parent cascades to children). This is the foundational data structure. Ref: FotP-SmartLists plan for all container instances.

payload.title: work:Die Object
payload.text: Properties: value (1-6), dieType (Standard/Immediate/Serf/Noble/ Artisan/Intrigue/Voyage/Decree), customFaces (array of face values or special symbols), isLocked, isTemporary, tempPipModifier. Methods: Roll() returns random face, MaxValue(), HasPipValue() (false for Intrigue ** and Voyage symbols when locked). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 dice-types-and-faces.

payload.title: work:Tile Object
payload.text: Properties: name, level (3-7), color (Yellow/Blue/Red), isArtifact (red tiles), isArtifactUsed. Children: list of Ability objects (SmartList parent-child). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 tile catalogs.

payload.title: work:Ability Object
payload.text: Properties: triggerType (StartOfTurn/AfterRoll/LockedAny/AllLocked/ Acquire/Select/EndOfTurn/OnSpecificRoll), dieTypeFilter (Standard/ Immediate/Custom/Active/Locked/Any), isPerTurn, isPerRoll, isArtifact, isUsedThisTurn, isUsedThisRoll. Abstract method: Execute(gameState, player). Child of a Tile (cascade delete). Ref: FotP-SmartLists ability-containers.

payload.title: work:Scarab Object
payload.text: Properties: type (Reroll/Pip/Die). Methods: Apply(die, gameState). Reroll: re-roll one active die. Pip: add +1 to die value (max 6). Die: create temporary standard die and roll it. Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 scarab-token-system.

payload.title: work:Player Object
payload.text: Owns SmartLists: ownedTiles, dicePool, scarabs. Derived views: ownedByColor (yellow/blue/red), ownedByLevel, bonusDiceSources. Properties: name, pyramidScore (sum of locked dice pip values). Ref: FotP-SmartLists per-player-state.

payload.title: work:Criteria Objects
payload.text: Abstract base with Evaluate(lockedDice) -> bool. Subclasses: NOfAKind(n), Straight(length), SumGreaterEqual(threshold), AllDifferent, AllEven, AllOdd, AllDiceInRange(min,max), Pair, TwoPairs, ThreePairs, FullHouse, PairOfValue(v), CompoundCriteria(list of criteria). Each bar slot has one. Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-bar-criteria-a-side.

payload.title: work:GameState Controller
payload.text: Singleton managing: turnOrder (SmartList of Players), currentPlayer, gamePhase (Setup/Playing/RollOff/GameOver), market (bar slots with tile stacks), tokenSupply, roundNumber. Methods: Setup(), StartRound(), NextPlayer(), EnterRollOff(), DetermineWinner(). Ref: FotP-GameLoop plan for full flow.

payload.title: work:TurnStateMachine
payload.text: Per-turn controller. States: StartOfTurn -> Rolling -> Locking -> ScarabUse -> ContinueDecision -> Claiming -> PostClaim -> EndOfTurn. Manages dice zone transitions (Cup->Active->Locked), roll counting, lock validation (must lock >= 1). Ref: FotP-GameLoop turn phases.

payload.title: work:Trigger/Event System
payload.text: When state transitions occur, fire triggers to matching abilities. FireTriggers(triggerType, player) -> collect all abilities with matching triggerType from player's owned tiles -> execute each. Queue system for abilities that need player input (choose a die). Ref: FotP-SmartLists triggered-abilities-queue.

payload.title: work:Market Manager
payload.text: Manages tile stacks per bar slot. Methods: GetClaimableTiles(player, lockedDice) evaluates criteria for each non-empty stack, filters by color-per-level restriction. ClaimTile(player, tile) pops from stack, pushes to player's ownedTiles. Ref: FotP-SmartLists tile-containers.

payload.title: work:Dice Zone Manager
payload.text: Manages die movement between SmartLists: Cup, Active, Locked, Set. Methods: RollAllInCup(), LockDie(die), UnlockDie(die) [rare], AutoLockImmediateDice(), CollectAllToCup(). Validates lock rules. Ref: FotP-SmartLists die-containers.

payload.title: work:Level 3 Tile Abilities (11 tiles)
payload.text: Farmer, Guard, Indentured Worker, Serf, Worker, Beggar, Servant, Soothsayer, Ankh (artifact), Ancestral Guidance (artifact), Omen (artifact + extra turn). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-3-tiles.

payload.title: work:Level 4 Tile Abilities (11 tiles)
payload.text: Artisan, Builder, Noble Adoption, Palace Servants, Soldier, Grain Merchant, Entertainer, Match Maker, Good Omen (artifact + extra turn), Palace Key (artifact), Spirit of the Dead (artifact). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-4-tiles.

payload.title: work:Level 5 Tile Abilities (11 tiles)
payload.text: Charioteer, Conspirator, Overseer, Ship Captain, Tomb Builder, Head Servant, Master Artisan, Priest, Bad Omen (artifact, affects others), Burial Mask (artifact), Royal Decree (artifact, roll-off). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-5-tiles.

payload.title: work:Level 6 Tile Abilities (11 tiles)
payload.text: Embalmer, Estate Overseer (stored die), Grain Trader, Priest of the Dead, Royal Attendants, Astrologer, Priestess, Surveyor (dice replacement), Pharaoh's Gift (artifact, redo roll-off), Secret Passage (artifact, extra claims), Treasure (artifact, split claims). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-6-tiles.

payload.title: work:Level 7 Tile Abilities (10 tiles)
payload.text: Queen (triggers roll-off), General, Grand Vizier, Granary Master (stored die), Heir, Royal Astrologer, Royal Mother (dice replacement), Queen's Favor (artifact, extra turn + claim), Royal Death (artifact, sets roll-off bar), Royal Power (artifact, extra claims). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 level-7-tiles.

payload.title: work:Custom Dice Face Abilities (4)
payload.text: Artisan * (adjust 1 die), Intrigue ** (adjust 2 dice, no pip when locked), Voyage faces (adjust/reroll/+2dice/lock), Decree * (adjust or borrow tile). Ref: FotP-Rules-v20 custom-dice-special-face-abilities.

payload.title: work:Queen Claim Trigger
payload.text: When Queen is claimed: set pharaohHolder, record pharaohScore, transition gamePhase to RollOff after current round completes. Award +1 die tokens to players who missed a turn this round.

payload.title: work:Roll-Off Turn Logic
payload.text: Each player gets 1 final turn. Same turn state machine but last turn. Compute max possible score to skip eliminated players. If player's locked dice total >= pharaohScore, transfer pharaoh.

payload.title: work:Queen's Last Chance
payload.text: If pharaoh was taken from Queen claimer, they get one more turn. Only fires if pharaohHolder != queenClaimer after all roll-off turns.

payload.title: work:Victory Determination
payload.text: pharaohHolder wins. Tie-break: closest to queenClaimer's right in turn order. Announce winner, display final state.

## Summary

I've verified that Phase 6 (Tile Randomization) is **complete and functionally correct**:

### Implementation Status ✓
All 7 core classes are implemented:
- **TileDefinition** (record): Immutable tile type (Id, Name, Level, Color)
- **TileCatalog** (static): Registry of all 54 tiles with filtering APIs
- **TilePool**: Manages tile availability with DrawRandom() and DrawSpecific()
- **MarketSlot**: Manages player-count-sized stacks of tiles
- **TileMarket**: Container with query methods (GetSlotsByLevel/Color, GetAvailableSlots, FindSlotByTileId)
- **TileDealer**: Core dealing algorithm with Deal() and Validate()
- **BarSlotRequest**: Tile requirement descriptor (fixed or random)

### Test Coverage ✓
**5 test files with comprehensive coverage:**
- **TileCatalogTests**: 10 methods (~14 individual tes
